description_long: This object consists of a large flat-screen television with a black bezel, mounted on a dark brown wooden TV stand. The television displays the LG logo and the phrase 'Life's Good' on its screen, indicating it is powered on. The TV stand features two white drawers at the front, providing storage space, and a small black electronic device with antennas, likely a Wi-Fi router or set-top box, is placed on the left side of the stand. The television is supported by two V-shaped legs, one at each end, which rest on the stand. The back of the television is plain and unadorned, with no visible ports or buttons, and the overall design is modern and minimalistic.
description: A large flat-screen LG television sits on a dark brown wooden stand with two white drawers and a small black device with antennas. The setup is sleek and modern, suitable for a living room or entertainment area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LG television screen, white drawers, and a small black device with antennas on the left side of the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the television and the depth of the dark brown stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the television and the full width of the dark brown stand, with the small device and antennas visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the television and the solid, rectangular shape of the stand.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin black plastic bezel with a matte finish and minimalistic styling.
